description_for_human: Create custom AI-powered emoticons and emoji from text descriptions instantly. Perfect for Discord, Telegram, social media, and messaging apps.
description_for_model: The Deep Vortex AI Emoticon Generator creates custom high-quality emoticons and emoji from text prompts using AI. Users describe the emoticon they want (e.g. 'wizard cat casting spell') and receive a PNG image instantly. Useful for creating custom Discord emoji, Telegram stickers, and social media reactions. Requires free account with credits (2 free on signup). Available at https://emoticons.deepvortexai.art/
